selection_rule: Top15 by latest weekly close / EMA200 - 1 across the 6 existing dashboards, excluding SOXX / EWY / QQQ / 000660 / 005930; then append SOXX / EWY / QQQ / 000660 / 005930 as pinned tickers. Duplicate tickers merge sources and keep the highest visible deviation if source payloads differ.
